case_title: OPORTUN INC. (FOMERLY PROGRESS FINANCIAL COPR.) VS. EDSON FELTRIN DO NASCIMENTO

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE PER THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. IS PRESENT.
